titleStmt.title: SII 7.341: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 341. (A.R. No. 148-A of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgasiraścuṁbica
ṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakava¨rṣaṁga 12
98 neya va¨rttamāna naḷasaṁvatsarada kā¨rttika śuddha 3 guru
vāradaṁdu śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Arirāyavibhā
ḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṇavoḍeya
ra nirūpadiṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bāccarasavoḍe
yaru bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladallu cauḷiya
kēriya Ariyabaḷiya balledēvasaṭṭiyara Aḷi
ya sirāṁgaseṭṭiyaru kellaṁgeṟeya vināyakadēvā
lyadali purāṇava hēḷisuva dha(ṁ)¨rmmakke A sirāṁgase
ṭṭi kayipāḍiya kaṁḍikadalu śrīvināyakadēva
ra dēvasvadoḷage votada hāneyali 15 mūḍe A
kki gēṇi bahaṁthā bāḷanu Ā sirāṁgaseṭi A vinā
yakadēvariṁge A¨rthaparicchēdavāgi koṭṭu mūlapari
cchēdavāgi cauḷiyakēriya seṭikāṟahalaru taṁ
moḷēkastarāgi Avara saṁmaṁdhadiṁda koṭa dha¨rmado
ḷu mūlava Ā seṭṭiya hādibāḷu vināyakadēva
ra dēvālyadallu purāṇava hēḷisuva dha(ṁ)¨rmmakke dhā
rāpū¨rvvakavāgi koṭṭaru I dha(ṁ)¨rmmava
nu pālisuvaru seṭṭikāṟaru . sa
masta halaru . dhānapālanayō [¨r*]maddhē dhānā chē
yōnupālanaṁ . dānā chva¨rggamavāpnōti
pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . yi dha¨r(ṁ)mmava naḷu
pidavaru vāraṇāsiyalli nūṟukavileya
vadhsida pāpa . maṁggaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
mataṁ bāleyaseṭṭiyara Āḷiya sirāṁ

gaseṭṭiyaru serekaṭṭi
yana bāḷage hoṟagaṇa braṁdu
nātadēvara dēvasvada bāḷana ge ba
yala gadde 1 koṭa vriti Aṁttu bittuva
bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 2 I
bāḷiṁga gēṇi Ākki nāgaṁḍugadalu votada hā
neyalu mūḍe [6 .] kke yi bāḷiyavoḷage Akkimū
ḍe 16 Aṁttu mūḍe 22 yidaṟavoḷage maṭha
kke Akki mūḍe 10 rudrapūjeya da(ṁ)¨rmmakke Ākki mū
ḍe 12 yeraḍu dēvālyada Akki dina
yī mūṟu dha¨rṁmmavanu balliyaseṭṭiyara A
ḷiya sirāṁguseṭṭiyaru māḍidaru . śrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 7.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
